text_raw: Worship the god of the sea or die!
text_clean: Worship the god of the sea or die!

text_raw: Defeated by a mortal... This can't be...
text_clean: Defeated by a mortal... This can't be...

text_raw: You've got nerve to lift your blade against the blessed god of the sea!
text_clean: You've got nerve to lift your blade against the blessed god of the sea!

text_raw: I'll see your bones and flesh strewn right across the waves!
text_clean: I'll see your bones and flesh strewn right across the waves!

text_raw: Ruin comes to any who defy my will.
